name: Date Pinwheel Cookies (100 Yr-Old Recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dough ingredients well and make into three balls.
2. For the filling, combine the ingredients in a 2-quart saucepan and boil until the dates are very soft. Mix well and cool.
3. Roll each ball of dough between wax paper to about 1/4 inch thickness. Spread with date filling and roll as a jelly roll.
4. Chill for about 1 hour.
5. Slice and bake at 375°F for 10 to 15 minutes.
